form.formComment: Having second run back today. Not raced for 42 days. Last start ran last in a small field at Kelso on February 28 over 4300m, 6 len behind Al Kalila with 68.5kg at $5.50. At only start last preparation won by a 0.0 len Wetherby on October 15 over 3900m defeating with 72kg at $2.80 in a steeplechase. Fitter and will be tough to beat this time.

form.formComment: Resuming after a break; having raced just once last preparation came from midfield; finished fourth in a small field at Musselburgh on February 1 over 3200m, 14 len behind Pure Carbon carrying 75.5kg at $8.50. First up last campaign settled back and ran on when finished fourth of 7 starters at Perth on April 23 over 3200m, 25 len behind Etalon with 74.5kg at $4.50. Don't underestimate.

form.formComment: Last start pulled up at Carlisle on March 22 over 4000m. Run before won by a head Carlisle on February 16 over 3200m defeating Hardy Du Seuil carrying 71kg at $5.50 in a steeplechase. Worth another chance and will prove hard to beat.

form.formComment: Recent form hard to fault. Last start finished third of 7 runners at Wetherby on March 17 over 3880m, 4.5 len behind Rath Gaul Hill with 77kg at $8. form.formComment: Useful gelding. Freshened for 55 days. Last start finished fourth of 7 runners at Musselburgh on February 15 over 4700m, slow track; 13 len behind Bridge Court carrying 76.5kg at $5. Race before ran on from midfield; finished third of 7 runners at Musselburgh on January 31 over 4700m, 6 len behind Kelce with 70.5kg at $7. In the mix on best and gets chance to feature.
